purpose: Base source for reusable platform admin resources. Menus, routes, permission codes, Refine resources, schemas and code generation previews are generated from this manifest plus enabled capability admin resources.

codegen.reason: Dashboard aggregates platform metrics instead of CRUD rows.
OpenAPI is generated from route metadata after the route contract is stable.
Upload flow needs storage adapter integration.
Token creation returns secret once and requires special response handling.
Capability registry is runtime-composed from plugin manifests.
Demo data is capability-provided and applied through capability hooks.
Branding is a singleton configuration resource.
Settings combine global and capability-provided configuration.
